commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway dashboard and incident APIs, a tool activity registry, process/autonomy summaries, Mission Control UI panels, overview polling, and unrelated root/script/test changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings via source inspection: the PR registers dashboard callbacks before requestContext assignment, records all global agent events without the current visibility guard, and classifies tool result events without data.isError. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
